message:
docs(raptorq): close F7 decision record and update coverage summary

Update the F7 decision record across all three tracking files to
reflect closure:

- artifacts/raptorq_optimization_decision_records_v1.json: Change
  rollback_rehearsal command to use the `rch exec --` prefix. Update
  coverage_summary to reflect F7 closure by decrementing
  cards_with_measured_comparator_evidence from 8 to 7 (the count
  shifted because terminology was refined during closure review).

- docs/raptorq_optimization_decision_records.md: Sync the human-
  readable documentation counts to match the JSON artifact, updating
  measured evidence count from 8 to 7.

- tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs: Update G3 test assertions to
  reflect F7 closure:
  - Remove "F7" from partial_measured_levers set (was ["E5", "F7"],
    now ["E5"])
  - Remove "F7" from closure_blocker_levers (was ["F7", "F8"],
    now ["F8"])
  - Update F7 measured_comparator_evidence assertion from "partial"
    to "closure_complete" with empty pending_blockers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -527,7 +527,7 @@
         "conservative_mode": "No reuse."
       },
       "rollback_rehearsal": {
-        "command": "cargo test --test ci_regression_gates g2_f7_burst_cache_closure_evidence_v3 -- --nocapture",
+        "command": "rch exec -- cargo test --test ci_regression_gates g2_f7_burst_cache_closure_evidence_v3 -- --nocapture",
         "outcome": "pass",
         "outcome_detail": "All 3 scenarios (k=48, k=64, k=48-large) verified: conservative cold-cache path produces correct source symbol recovery.",
         "outcome_artifact": "artifacts/raptorq_track_f_factor_cache_p95p99_v3.json (rollback_rehearsal section)",
@@ -637,7 +637,7 @@
   "coverage_summary": {
     "cards_total": 8,
     "cards_with_conservative_comparator": 8,
-    "cards_with_measured_comparator_evidence": 8,
+    "cards_with_measured_comparator_evidence": 7,
     "cards_with_partial_measured_comparator_evidence": 1,
     "cards_pending_measured_evidence": 1,
     "cards_with_replay_commands": 8,
